action.reasoning:
Observation: Best rmse_z500=440.03 from iter 22 (3-model ensemble with TTA). I have 1.2h remaining and 8 iterations. The 3-model ensemble improved from 444.64 to 440.03. 

Analysis: I have time for maybe 1-2 more training runs (~30 min each). The ensemble approach is working well. Options:
1. Train a 4th model with different seed/hyperparameters to add to ensemble
2. Try different TTA strategies
3. Train with different architecture variant

The most impactful thing: train a 4th model with seed=789 and add to ensemble. Each additional diverse model reduces variance. I have ~1.2h = 72 min, so I can fit one more training run (~35 min) and still have time to submit eval.

Decision: Train model4 with seed=789, then update predict.py to ensemble all 4 models, submit eval.
action.command: cd /workspace && SEED=789 SAVE_NAME=model4 LR=2e-4 WEIGHT_DECAY=2e-4 BASE_CH=128 EMBED_DIM=512 DEPTH=10 DROPOUT=0.15 RAB_ITERATION=23 python train_ensemble.py
